articles.title: Trump's Surgeon General Pick: A Pro-Vaccine Voice in a Vaccine-Skeptic Administration
articles.summary: Dr. Nicole Saphier, a radiologist and former Fox News contributor, is Trump's new nominee for surgeon general. She supports vaccines more than some officials and has criticized the administration's health missteps as 'embarrassing.'

articles.title: Spirit Airlines Grounded for Good: The End of Ultra-Low-Cost Flying?
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines ceased operations on May 2, 2026, after failing to secure a $500 million federal bailout. The budget carrier's collapse could lead to higher fares as competition dwindles.

articles.title: Spain Accuses Israel of 'Kidnapping' Spanish National from Gaza Aid Flotilla
articles.summary: Spain demanded the immediate release of Saif Abukeshek, a Spanish citizen arrested during an Israeli raid on a Gaza-bound flotilla. Foreign Minister Albares called the detention 'illegal' and a 'kidnapping,' while Israel alleges Hamas ties.
